presets.name: Battle Chateau
presets.description: Bulbapedia-imported trainer roster for this battle in offline archive form.
howToBeat: Keep a stable answer for tyrantrum, which functions as the likely closer in this roster.
Bring pressure that does not fold to the team's rock core.
